title: GalloDoc Core v1
description: Open-core public envelope for GalloDoc. FROZEN v1 contract — additive changes only via the extensions namespace. Top-level required sections must always exist; their inner fields default to safe empty values when not populated. See docs/specs/GALLODOC_CORE_V1_FROZEN.md for stability rules.

extensions.description: Open extension namespace. Vendors and tenants publish stable subkeys (e.g. extensions.halobridge.*, extensions.<tenant_slug>.*). The v1 schema does not constrain inner shapes — but vendors are expected to keep their own subschemas backwards-compatible.

media.description: Optional media descriptors when the document carries non-text content.

policy.description: Optional policy evaluation summaries (decisions only — no policy formulas).

corrections.description: Optional reviewer correction summaries (no raw PHI).

lineage.description: Optional lineage payload (W3C PROV / OpenLineage compatible).

metrics.description: Optional processing metrics (timing, retries, runtime metadata).

ai_usage.description: Provider/model/token/cost/latency usage ledger for every AI call against this document. Raw prompts/responses are never carried — only hashes.

gallounits.description: Model-agnostic semantic evidence units. Models may tokenize differently, but they should all be able to point back to the same GalloUnit.

certification.description: Human-only, evidence-backed, policy-bound attestation that a GalloDoc has been certified by an authorized certifier.

certifier.description: Optional descriptor of the domain authority that performed the certification (HIM-C / SME / Providence Certifier). Identity references only — no credential secrets.

gstp.description: GalloDoc Secure Transport Package — signed, tamper-evident portable package for certified GalloDocs. Carries references and hashes only; full signing materials are enterprise-internal.

truth_ledger.description: Additive immutable truth/change history. Carries claim and event summaries plus hashes — never the raw prior values.

execution_governance.description: Optional GalloDoc Core v1.1 — governed AI/tool/agent execution on traceable documents. Uses hashes and opaque references only; never raw PHI, prompts, responses, OAuth tokens, IP/session hashes.

execution_receipts.description: Proof objects — references and hashes only.

consent_ledger.description: Optional GalloDoc Core v1.2 — consent ledger (metadata only; no raw signatures or personal identifiers).

chain_of_custody.description: Optional v1.2 — custody events (hashes and opaque locations; no raw URLs).

human_decisions.description: Optional v1.2 — human review decisions (roles and codes only).

attestations.description: Optional v1.2 — trust/policy attestations (signature_ref optional digest only).

redaction_manifest.description: Optional v1.2 — redaction audit trail (categories and field names only where policy allows).

evidence_quality.description: Optional v1.2 — evidence quality summary for attestation.

data_residency.description: Optional GalloDoc Core v1.3 — data residency / boundary hints (no tenant secrets).

training_permissions.description: Optional v1.3 — AI training use permissions (metadata only).

model_risk.description: Optional v1.3 — model/provider risk summary (hashed model id; no prompts/responses).

retention_status.description: Optional v1.3 — retention / legal hold snapshot.

agent_observability.description: Optional GalloDoc Core v1.4 — agent evaluation, tracing, observability (hashes and summaries only; never raw prompts, chain-of-thought, or PHI).

trust_decision.description: Optional GalloDoc Core v1.5 — trust scores, decision gates, policy outcomes, recommendations, and receipts. Explainable summaries and scores only; no proprietary weight formulas, raw PHI, prompts, responses, or secrets.

agent_supply_chain_security.description: Optional GalloDoc Core v1.6 — agent supply chain security for install/run/delegation risk across skills, MCP tools, prompt packs, browser agents, and executable skill bundles. Stores hashes, summaries, scanner IDs, sandbox observations, and decision records only; never raw secrets, PHI, executable payloads, or host execution output.

$comment: Forbidden under the v1 contract: 'fhir' (extension), 'structured_data' (extension), 'entities' (extension), 'audit' (enterprise), 'app_results' (enterprise), 'replay_summary' (enterprise). These belong under extensions.halobridge.* or stay private. Field map: docs/specs/gallodoc-core-v1-field-map.csv. Amendment 1 added required sections: ai_usage, gallounits, certification, gstp, truth_ledger; optional certifier. GalloDoc Core v1.1 adds optional top-level execution_governance (schema_version gallodoc.execution_governance.v1.1). GalloDoc Core v1.2 adds optional consent_ledger, chain_of_custody, human_decisions, attestations, redaction_manifest, evidence_quality — compliance metadata only; no raw URLs, PHI, or signature payloads. GalloDoc Core v1.3 adds optional data_residency, training_permissions, model_risk, retention_status — AI risk / data governance metadata only; never raw training payloads, prompts, or model weights. GalloDoc Core v1.4 adds optional agent_observability — traces, tool logs, retrieval summaries, metrics, evaluations, failures, regressions, escalations — safe summaries and hashes only; never raw prompts, responses, chain-of-thought, or PHI chunks. GalloDoc Core v1.5 adds optional trust_decision — trust scores, gates, policy outcomes, recommendations, receipts — explainable only; no proprietary formulas or sensitive payloads. GalloDoc Core v1.6 adds optional agent_supply_chain_security — install/run/delegation risk for AI agent packages, skills, MCP tools, prompt packs, browser agents, and executable bundles; hashes, summaries, scanner IDs, sandbox observations, and decisions only; no raw secrets, PHI, executable payloads, host execution output, or network-on sandbox defaults.
